claims.text: Deep Reinforcement Learning offers an alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking
claims.source_quote: Deep Reinforcement Learning (DRL) offers a robust alternative to traditional control methods for autonomous underwater docking

claims.text: The researchers used the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV) for their docking experiment
claims.source_quote: This paper presents a systematic approach for autonomous docking using the Girona Autonomous Underwater Vehicle (AUV)

claims.text: The researchers adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework
claims.source_quote: We adapted the Stonefish simulator into a multiprocessing RL framework to significantly accelerate the learning process

claims.text: The simulation incorporated realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise
claims.source_quote: incorporating realistic AUV dynamics, collision models, and sensor noise

claims.text: The researchers used the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm
claims.source_quote: Using the Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO) algorithm

claims.text: The control policy was trained with randomized starting positions
claims.source_quote: developed a 6-DoF control policy trained in a headless environment with randomized starting positions to ensure generalized performance

claims.text: The reward structure included distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties
claims.source_quote: Our reward structure accounts for distance, orientation, action smoothness, and adaptive collision penalties

claims.text: The agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation
claims.source_quote: Experimental results demonstrate that the agent achieved a success rate of over 90% in simulation

claims.text: The DRL controller was successfully validated in a physical test tank
claims.source_quote: successful validation in a physical test tank confirmed the efficacy of the sim-to-reality adaptation

claims.text: The DRL controller exhibited emergent behaviors including pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations
claims.source_quote: the DRL controller exhibiting emergent behaviors such as pitch-based braking and yaw oscillations to assist in mechanical alignment
